---
title: "stamdata"
subtitle: "`stamdata`"
description: "stamdata"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/stamdata/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                   | Title                                | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|----------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                                | The unique name of the event         | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `center`                               | Research center                      | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `record_id_s`                          | record_id_s                          | string | Record ID. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `id_number_pre`                        | id_number_pre                        | string | ID number pre inclusion. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `name_stamdata`                        | name_stamdata                        | string | Name of participant. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `date_of_birth_stamdata`               | date_of_birth_stamdata               | date   | Date of birth. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `cpr_stamdata`                         | cpr_stamdata                         | string | CPR of participant. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `sex_stamdata`                         | sex_stamdata                         | string | Sex of the participant. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `phone_stamdata`                       | phone_stamdata                       | number | Phonenumber of participant. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `e_mail_stamdata`                      | e_mail_stamdata                      | string | Email of the participant. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `adress_stamdata`                      | adress_stamdata                      | string | Address of participant. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `t2_debut_stamdata`                    | t2_debut_stamdata                    | string | Debut year of T2D. Master data. Not filled in from i1050.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `current_year_stamdata`                | current_year_stamdata                | string | This year, value used for calculation. Master data. Not filled in from i1050.                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `t2_duration_stamdata`                 | t2_duration_stamdata                 | string | Number of years the participant has had T2D. Master data. Not filled in from i1050. Derived using the formula: ([current_year_stamdata]-[t2_debut_stamdata])                                                                                                                                     |
| `date_hba1c_first_stamdata`            | date_hba1c_first_stamdata            | date   | Date of first HbA1c ≥ 48 mmol/mol. Master data. Filled out from i1050.                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `first_hba1c_comments_stamdata`        | first_hba1c_comments_stamdata        | string | Comments regarding the date of the first HbA1c ≥ 48 mmol/mol. Master data. Possible to fill out from i1050.                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `date_today_stamdata`                  | date_today_stamdata                  | date   | Date when date for HbA1c ≥ 48 mmol/mol was entered. Master data. Filled out from i1050.                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `t2d_duration_stamdata`                | t2d_duration_stamdata                | string | Number of years the participant has had T2D. Master data. Filled out from i1050. Derived using the formula: round(datediff([date_hba1c_first_stamdata],[date_today_stamdata], "y", true),1)                                                                                                      |
| `other_diagnoses_stamdata`             | other_diagnoses_stamdata             | string | List of other diagnoses than T2D the patient may have. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `extra_info_participant_stamdata`      | extra_info_participant_stamdata      | string | Any additional information regarding the participant. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `gp_stamdata`                          | gp_stamdata                          | string | Name and city of the participant's general practitioner. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `treatment_responsibility_stamdata`    | treatment_responsibility_stamdata    | string | Treatment responsibility for blood glucose and blood pressure management (general practitioner or trial site physician). Master data.                                                                                                                                                            |
| `recruitment_source_v1`                | recruitment_source_v1                | string | States recruitment source: ON LiMiT website; Other website; Recruitment agency (TrialTree); General practitioner; Danish Diabetes Association; Social media (e.g. Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn); Physical poster (e.g. health centre, library, GP practice); Other; Cannot recall. Master data. |
| `recruitment_source_other_master_data` | recruitment_source_other_master_data | string | Specifikation, if the recruitment source selected was "Other". Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `dropout_before_v1`                    | dropout_before_v1                    | string | Reason for dropout before prescreening. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `dropout_reason_before_v1`             | dropout_reason_before_v1             | string | Note on why the participant was not interested in the project. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `dropout_criteria_before_v1`           | dropout_criteria_before_v1           | string | Record the in- or exclusion criteria the participant failed on. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `dropout_other_before_v1`              | dropout_other_before_v1              | string | Additional notes regarding dropout. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `dropout_prescreen`                    | dropout_prescreen                    | string | Reason for dropout at prescreening. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `dropout_reason_prescreen`             | dropout_reason_prescreen             | string | Note on why the participant was not interested in the project. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `dropout_criteria_prescreen`           | dropout_criteria_prescreen           | string | Record the in- or exclusion criteria the participant failed on. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `dropout_other_prescreen`              | dropout_other_prescreen              | string | Additional notes regarding dropout. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `dropout_v1`                           | dropout_v1                           | string | Reason for dropout at visit 1. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `dropout_reason_v1`                    | dropout_reason_v1                    | string | Note on why the participant was not interested in the project. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `dropout_criteria_v1`                  | dropout_criteria_v1                  | string | Record the in- or exclusion criteria the participant failed on. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `dropout_other_v1`                     | dropout_other_v1                     | string | Additional notes regarding dropout. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `dropout_baseline`                     | dropout_baseline                     | string | Participant dropped out between the baseline visits (V1, V2, V3, V4). Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `dropout_reason_baseline`              | dropout_reason_baseline              | string | Reason for droupout during baseline visits. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `dropout_reason_expl_baseline`         | dropout_reason_expl_baseline         | string | Elaborate participant's reason for dropout at baseline. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `dropout_intervention`                 | dropout_intervention                 | string | Whether the participant dropped out during the intervention period. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `dropout_time`                         | dropout_time                         | string | When the participant dropped out during the intervention period. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `dropout_weeks_completed`              | dropout_weeks_completed              | number | The number of weeks the participant completed of the intervention. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `dropout_reason`                       | dropout_reason                       | string | Reason for droupout during the intervention. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `dropout_reason_expl`                  | dropout_reason_expl                  | string | Elaborate the reason if possible. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `interventionen_completed`             | interventionen_completed             | string | Whether participant has completed the intervention period of 52 weeks. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `notes_intervention`                   | notes_intervention                   | string | Notes about the participation in the intervention period. Master data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |

: Fields in the `stamdata` resource.
